# Rosebud Global — Full content

> Rosebud Global Ltd is a UK business systems consultancy building custom AI systems that replace founder-dependent operational work. We build and run bespoke systems for SMEs in recruitment, insurance, aesthetics, legal, property, trades, and hospitality.

## Contact
- Email: contact@rosebud.global
- Booking: https://cal.eu/rosebudsolutions/30min
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Legal entity: Rosebud Global Ltd (Company No. 16623472)
- Founders: Anselm Jr. Okojie (CEO), Sajni Okojie (COO)
- Founded: 2025

---

# Homepage (https://rosebud.global/)

## Hero

Your business runs on you. That needs to change.

Your digital team. Live in 5 weeks. Running for years.

## Inside your digital team

Five roles, deployed in 5 weeks. Each one handles work that used to run on your personal effort.

1. **Receptionist & Appointment Setter** — Takes first contact from every channel (calls, emails, web forms, DMs). Qualifies enquiries against your criteria, books them directly into your calendar, and routes anything high-value to you for review. You stop being the first person every enquiry has to reach.

2. **Lead Engine** — Scrapes qualified leads from Google Maps and LinkedIn using your target keywords, at the volume your pipeline can actually handle. Cleans, validates, and scores each one on a 0–100 scale. Routes Hot, Warm, and Nurture tiers to the right sequences. You stop guessing which leads are worth your time.

3. **Omnichannel Voice** — Personalised email outreach at scale, SMS follow-up, and AI voice calls that book directly into your calendar. We call them, book them, follow up. The AI voice agent handles first contact, nurture, and appointment booking end-to-end.

4. **Pipeline Concierge** — Warm leads that go quiet are re-engaged automatically. Cold drop-offs are revived on your behalf. You never chase someone who's already said no — and you never lose someone who just got busy.

5. **Operations Audit** — Every week, a report that tells you exactly where your operation is losing time, what's working, what's broken, and what to fix next.

All five roles deploy as one connected system. You don't add them one at a time — they go live together at the end of week 5.

---

# Recruitment (https://rosebud.global/industries/recruitment)

## Hero

Your recruitment, rebuilt.

Not a tool. A custom recruitment system we build and run for you.

We build it in 5 weeks. We run it. You interview.

## Section I — The seven-step loop

Here's how recruitment runs on your desk right now:

1. JD lands on your desk
2. Post to your CRM — synced to free job boards
3. LinkedIn when the boards fail
4. High volume. Low quality. 100 applications. Three worth reading.
5. Every CV. Manual. One by one.
6. Tag candidates. Shortlist. Directors. Interviews.
7. Wrong hire. Start again.

Every pound fixing a bad hire is a pound not going into campaigns, clients, or growth. And it all lands on one person. What if six of those seven steps ran without them?

## Section II — What's included

Every deployment is built around your desks, your briefs, and your ICP. Seven roles run as one system — operated by us, handed to you.

- Candidate Sourcing Engine — targeted search across LinkedIn and sector networks, filtered against your ICP
- CV Screening & Shortlisting — agentic AI reading every profile against your criteria
- Automated Outreach Sequences — multi-touch personalised sequences, sent without manual input
- CRM Auto-Population — everything written directly into your CRM, nothing typed
- Pipeline Management — warm candidates tracked, re-engaged, ready when the next role opens
- Behaviour-Triggered Follow-Up — re-engagement handled automatically
- Operational Audit & Roadmap — where your operation is losing time, and what to fix next

You own every system we build. Full access. Full credentials. Full data. No lock-in. Cancel any time. Pricing shared on the demo call — scoped to the volume and seniority of the roles you hire for.

## Section III — What changes on day one

By the time a candidate moves forward, they've been cross-referenced and validated across multiple sources. Every profile arrives interview-ready. Of the eight steps between brief and interview, your recruiter runs two. We run the other six.

## Section IV — Who this is for

This works for you if you're running multiple live briefs at once, your biggest bottleneck is CV volume not client volume, you're already using a CRM or open to one, you can commit to an ICP definition session in week one, and you want candidates sourced not applicants filtered.

This isn't for you if you hire purely through word-of-mouth and relationships, you're looking for a chatbot or a single AI tool not a system, or you want software to run yourself — this is a service, not a product.

## FAQ

**How fast can you respond to a new candidate?** The average recruiter takes 2–3 hours to follow up on a new enquiry. By then, two other agencies already have. Rosebud agents respond instantly — capturing availability, salary expectations, and experience level the moment a candidate makes contact.

**How does pre-screening work?** Rosebud connects to your ATS and job boards, assesses suitability against live roles, and flags who is ready to move — so by the time a consultant picks up the phone, the work is already done.

**How are candidates routed to the right consultant?** Your agent gathers role type, salary band, location, and notice period, then routes each candidate to the right consultant with full context attached.

**How quickly can we move from brief to active search?** Every new role brief involves the same back-and-forth. Your agent handles the entire intake automatically and has the brief structured before a consultant picks up the phone.

**What stops warm clients going cold?** Automated follow-ups keep every client and prospect engaged after every touchpoint, progressing stalled briefs and putting your agency front of mind the moment a new hiring need surfaces.

**How do we see where every placement stands?** Every interaction is logged, every stage is tracked, and managers get live visibility into where briefs are stalling and where consultants need support.

**Is this built for regulated recruitment environments?** Every candidate interaction, data capture, and communication is structured to meet employment agency compliance requirements from the first touchpoint.

**What visibility do managers get?** Every interaction is logged with clear records of candidate conversations, qualification data, and progression. Managers get real-time transparency into pipeline activity, consultant performance, and exactly where drop-off is happening.

**How do you make sure the system works from day one?** Every workflow is tested and validated before launch — your agent follows approved messaging, routes candidates and clients correctly, and operates to the standard your agency is known for from day one.

---

# Insurance (https://rosebud.global/industries/insurance)

## Hero

Half the week your team doesn't write. That's the half we run.

5-week build. We run it. Your advisors do the work only they can do.

Your licensed advisors spend as much time on documentation, data entry, and follow-up as they do on writing business. We build the system that takes the admin half off their desk, so the writing half gets its hours back.

## Section I — Where the hours go

Where recruitment runs on your desk right now:

1. Enquiry comes in — new business, MTA, or renewal prompt
2. Fact-find: risk details, claims history, SIC codes, schedules, sum insured
3. Chase the client for the documents that didn't come with the first reply
4. Submit to carriers — five different portals, five different formats
5. Quotes come back structured differently. Build the client-ready comparison.
6. Send it. Wait. Send the reminder. Wait.
7. Bind — then diary the renewal and start over in 11 months.

Every account, the same loop. Every renewal, the loop starts again. What if five of those seven steps ran without them?

## Section II — What's included

Built around your lines, your carriers, your book. One setup. One monthly figure. No per-seat pricing. Live in 5 weeks.

- Enquiry Intake — every new enquiry answered the moment it lands
- Fact-Find Automation — risk details, claims history, and documentation requests captured through structured conversation
- Market Submission Support — client data prepared in the format each carrier's portal expects
- Quote Comparison Assembly — carrier responses pulled together into client-ready comparisons automatically
- CRM Auto-Population — every conversation, every document, every decision filed directly into your CRM
- Renewal & MTA Management — renewal cycles diarised, mid-term adjustments handled without dropping in your advisors' laps
- Operational Audit & Roadmap — where your operation is losing time, and what to fix next

You own every system we build. Full access. Full credentials. Full data. No lock-in. Cancel any time. Pricing shared on the demo call — scoped to the volume of enquiries and the complexity of the lines you write.

## Section III — What changes on day one

By the time a prospect reaches your licensed advisor, the fact-find is complete, the documentation is in, and the risk is ready to submit. Every account arrives ready to quote. Of the eight steps between enquiry and bound policy, your team runs two. We run the other six.

## Section IV — Who this is for

This works for you if you're handling enquiry volume across multiple lines or products, your advisors spend more time on admin than on quoting or closing, you've got a book of renewals that keeps the same loop spinning every year, and you want your licensed people doing work that only licensed people can do.

This isn't for you if you're writing one or two policies a month on introducer referrals only, you're looking for a chatbot not a system, or you want software to run yourself.

## FAQ

**How do you handle policy inquiries instantly?** Conversational agents manage high-volume client questions — coverage details, policy options, pricing ranges. Prospects receive immediate answers while the system captures qualification signals.

**How is lead intake and pre-qualification automated?** Connect your agent to your CRM and quoting tools to collect prospect details, assess eligibility, and guide them through the early stages. The system identifies whether someone is shopping, comparing policies, or ready to speak with an agent.

**How are prospects routed to the right advisor?** Agents gather coverage type, budget range, household details, and renewal timelines, then route qualified leads to the appropriate agent.

**How do you support quote preparation?** AI agents collect required details for quotes, confirm information accuracy, and prepare structured data for underwriting or quoting systems.

**How are follow-ups managed?** Automated follow-ups keep prospects engaged — answering additional questions, reminding them to complete applications, and surfacing new policy options when relevant.

**How do agents assist with policy updates?** From coverage adjustments and renewal reminders to document requests and policy explanations, AI agents handle routine servicing tasks.

**Is this designed for regulated insurance environments?** Systems are structured to support U.S. insurance regulatory requirements, ensuring conversations and data collection follow appropriate compliance standards.

**What visibility do agencies get?** Every interaction is logged with clear records of inquiries, qualification data, and next steps. Managers gain transparency into pipeline activity, lead quality, and operational performance.

**How do you make sure workflows launch safely?** Workflows are tested and validated before launch to ensure the agent follows approved scripts, routes prospects correctly, and supports compliance requirements.

---

# Privacy Notice (https://rosebud.global/privacy)

Rosebud Global Ltd respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal information of individuals who interact with us. This Policy applies to information we collect on our website (rosebud.global), our digital platforms, and other channels owned or controlled by Rosebud.

We collect contact information, account information, financial and trading activity data, professional information, demographic and preference information, technical and device data, usage data, and recruitment data. We use this data to provide services, communicate with you, personalise your experience, conduct analytics, maintain website integrity, and comply with legal obligations. Lawful bases include contract, legitimate interests, legal obligations, and consent.

We use first-party and third-party cookies including Google Analytics, Klaviyo, ManyChat, FX Blue, MyFXBook, Telegram, and Vantage. You can accept or reject non-essential cookies via the consent banner.

Your UK GDPR rights include access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection, and withdrawal of consent. To exercise these rights, contact contact@rosebud.global.

Full policy at https://rosebud.global/privacy.

---

# Terms of Service (https://rosebud.global/terms)

These Terms govern your use of https://rosebud.global and any related services provided by Rosebud Global Ltd. By accessing our website, submitting your information, or engaging with our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

Rosebud Solutions provides AI systems consultation, automation strategy, AI agent implementation, and related advisory services. Consultations are provided for informational and commercial planning purposes. No guarantees are made regarding revenue increases, performance improvements, or specific business outcomes.

All content is the property of Rosebud Global Ltd. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or commercially exploit any material without prior written consent. Total liability capped at the amount paid to us for services in the preceding 30 days.

These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Full terms at https://rosebud.global/terms.
